flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Mississippi rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.9k → $28.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Mississippi fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Mississippi rose 34% between 2021 and 2024 (16.0k → 21.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Mississippi rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (51.5% → 57.3%).
